attr.title: Crypt of the NecroDancer
attr.desc: Award-winning rhythm roguelike. Move to the music and slay to the beat!
attr.desc_md:
Crypt of the NecroDancer is an award-winning hardcore roguelike rhythm game. Move to the music and deliver beatdowns to the beat! Groove to the epic Danny Baranowsky soundtrack, or choose from the collection of remixes.

This port uses [Machismo](https://github.com/bmdhacks/machismo) to run the native Apple Silicon (arm64) Mac build directly on aarch64 Linux — no CPU emulation needed.
attr.inst: Requires macOS game files from GOG (.pkg installers) or Steam (two Mac depots). DLC (Amplified/Synchrony) supported via GOG only. See README.md for details.
attr.inst_md:
## Installation

Requires the **macOS** version from GOG or Steam.

### GOG (recommended)
1. Purchase on [GOG](https://www.gog.com/game/crypt_of_the_necrodancer)
2. Download the **macOS** `.pkg` installer(s) — base game plus any DLC
3. Place all `.pkg` files in `necrodancer/gamedata/`
4. Launch — extraction happens automatically (may take 10+ minutes per .pkg)

### Steam
1. Purchase on [Steam](https://store.steampowered.com/app/247080/Crypt_of_the_NecroDancer/)
2. Download both Mac depots: `download_depot 247080 247082` and `download_depot 247080 247086`
3. Place `depot_247082/` and `depot_247086/` in `necrodancer/gamedata/`
4. Launch — the patcher merges the depots automatically
